data.title: Study Shows Habit-Formation App Improves Long-Term Weight Loss In National Diabetes Prevention Program
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 12, 2026, Fresh Tri®, a prominent neuroscience-based behavior change company, revealed their groundbreaking platform's success in achieving significant long-term weight loss and retention rates. The platform has showcased superior effectiveness compared to the gold-standard behavior change program. This development highlights Fresh Tri's leading position in utilizing neuroscience to drive impactful results in weight management.

data.title: WTWH Healthcare Announces the Frontline Honors Awards Class of 2025
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Cleveland, WTWH Healthcare, a division of WTWH Media, LLC, revealed the Frontline Honors Class of 2025. This year's honorees span various sectors including behavioral health, home health & home care, hospice & palliative care, memory care, senior housing & senior living. The recognition celebrates individuals who have showcased exceptional dedication and commitment to their respective fields. The awards highlight a diverse group of professionals contributing significantly to the healthcare industry.

data.title: Ulta Beauty Likely To Report Lower Q4 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Ulta Beauty, Inc. is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, March 12. Analysts predict earnings of $8.03 per share, a decrease from $8.46 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $3.82 billion, up from $3.49 billion a year ago. Ulta Beauty recently opened its first store in the United Arab Emirates at Mall of the Emirates on Jan. 29, in collaboration with Alshaya Group. On Wednesday, Ulta Beauty's shares grew by 0.8% to close at $652.65. For more information and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Flam Onboards Ben Feld of Niantic Labs to Scale Interactive Advertising
data.description: A tech startup, Flam, based in San Francisco, has recently hired Ben Feld as their new Sales Lead. With over 15 years of experience, Feld has a background representing immersive technology platforms at major global events such as Cannes Lions, SXSW, and VivaTech. He has closely collaborated with various brands to navigate future digital engagement strategies. Feld is recognized for his ability to work efficiently in cross-functional teams and has previously led multiple long-term SaaS initiatives.

data.title: CPSC's New Federal Water Beads Safety Standard Takes Effect to Protect Children from Deadly Hazard
data.description: On March 12, 2026, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission introduced a new Federal Safety Standard for Water Beads, which has come into effect. As per the announcement, water beads produced post this date are required to adhere to the updated federal guidelines concerning performance, labeling, and testing to ensure consumer safety. This measure aims to enhance the regulation of water beads in the market, safeguarding consumers from potential risks associated with these products.

data.title: Campbell's Analysts Slash Their Forecasts After Downbeat Q2 Results
data.description: Campbell's Co (NASDAQ: CPB) has reported disappointing financial results for Q2, with earnings of 51 cents per share falling short of the analyst consensus of 57 cents per share. The company's quarterly sales were $2.564 billion, missing the estimate of $2.610 billion. Consequently, they have adjusted their FY26 EPS guidance below estimates. The CEO, Mick Beekhuizen, noted that while the Meals & Beverages portfolio showed growth, Snacks performance was weaker than expected due to storm-related shipment disruptions. The Rao's brand achieved over $1 billion in net sales over the past twelve months. Campbell's is strategizing ways to improve Snacks performance through value enhancement, new product innovation, and in-market actions.

data.title: QuantumStreet AI Launches Long-Short Equity Strategy on The Back of Strong Performance
data.description: Investors are benefiting from an AI-powered investment approach that assists in managing market fluctuations resulting from geopolitical tensions and high valuations. On March 12, 2026, in New York, QuantumStreet AI (also known as "QuantumStreet"), a company affiliated with IBM and focused on AI-driven investment strategies, revealed its latest initiative. This innovative approach is catering to the needs of investors amid increased market instability, offering a solution that leverages artificial intelligence to navigate through challenging economic landscapes characterized by geopolitical uncertainties and inflated valuations.

data.title: When Reality Becomes Idea: G-SHOCK x Joshua Vides
data.description: A new collaboration between Casio America, Inc. and graphic artist Joshua Vides has resulted in a limited-edition release that showcases Vides' distinctive hand-drawn style on two classic silhouettes. This collaboration was introduced in Jersey City, N.J., on March 12, 2026. The collaboration captures Vides' unique aesthetic and offers consumers a chance to own a piece of his artwork on a popular product line.

data.title: From Manual Workflows to AI Agents: How Hyperlink InfoSystem Is Transforming Businesses
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in both New York and Los Angeles, there has been a growing trend among businesses to enhance operational efficiency and decrease reliance on manual procedures. Numerous enterprises are still utilizing conventional methods like spreadsheets and emails as part of their workflows. This shift comes as companies aim to streamline operations and diminish the need for manual intervention.

data.title: ChiroTouch Earns 2026 Pinnacle Award for Digital Health AI Innovation
data.description: A company specializing in chiropractic technology was acknowledged for creating the inaugural AI assistant designed specifically for chiropractors. Based in San Diego, on March 12, 2026, ChiroTouch, a prominent provider of chiropractic EHR and practice management systems, revealed that it was honored with the Emerald award for this innovation.

data.title: Patient Care America Launches KidneyLyfe, a Digital Community Empowering People Living with Kidney Disease
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Pompano Beach, Florida, a new platform was launched to assist patients dealing with chronic kidney disease and undergoing dialysis. Patient Care America, a leading renal healthcare provider focused on precision, introduced this initiative on World Kidney Day. The platform aims to offer support to patients through connection, education, and peer support. This program is designed to help individuals struggling with kidney disease, and offers a range of resources and tools to aid them.

data.title: US Bureau of Reclamation and HeroX Launch "Crack the Case" to Detect Hidden Threats in America's Dams
data.description: A total of $400,000 in prizes are being offered for innovative techniques that can detect subsurface cracks in embankment dams before they lead to failure. The competition, named "Crack the Case," was recently introduced by HeroX, a prominent platform for crowdsourced solutions. This initiative aims to encourage the development of groundbreaking methods for early identification of hidden fissures in dams to prevent potential disasters.

data.title: Jimmy Battrell Announced as Next CEO of the Management Council
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on March 12, 2026, the Board of Trustees of the Ohio Education Computer Network (OECN) Management Council revealed the selection of Jimmy Battrell as the incoming CEO, effective June. Mr. Battrell will lead the Management Council in this new role.
